ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "fund_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund manager responsible for the transaction */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial institution involved */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pension fund scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the pension fund scheme */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_fund_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_manager_id") REFERENCES fund_managers ("fund_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_managers" (
  "fund_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fund manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fund manager */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial institution the fund manager belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the fund manager */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the fund manager */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the fund manager (e.g., lead manager, co-manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fund manager was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the fund manager was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the financial institution */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body overseeing the institution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the institution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the institution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pension fund scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the pension fund scheme */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the scheme is associated with (e.g., Central Govt, State Govt) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the pension fund scheme (e.g., Tier I, Tier II) */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial institution managing the scheme */,
  "scheme_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the scheme */,
  "scheme_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the scheme */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the scheme (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scheme was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scheme was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheme_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pension fund scheme */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date for which the performance metrics are recorded */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Return rate of the scheme for the given date */,
  "asset_value" REAL /* Total asset value of the scheme for the given date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheme_performance_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_investment" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment record */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pension fund scheme */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the investment was made */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested in the given sector */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_investment_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk record */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pension fund scheme */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the scheme (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the scheme (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the risk record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the risk record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_communication" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client involved in the communication */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message or description of the communication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the communication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the communication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_communication_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES scheme_participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction or activity being audited */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pension fund scheme */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date for which the report is generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Actual report data (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheme_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pension fund scheme */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheme_versions_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio record */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pension fund scheme */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Asset class of the investment (e.g., stocks, bonds, real estate) */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested in the given asset class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_portfolios_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_manager_performance" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review record */,
  "fund_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund manager being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating given to the fund manager */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided in the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_manager_performance_fund_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_manager_id") REFERENCES fund_managers ("fund_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheme_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant record */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pension fund scheme */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheme_participants_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy record */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pension fund scheme */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment strategy */,
  "strategy_description" TEXT /* Description of the investment strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_strategies_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pension fund scheme */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend analysis */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pension fund scheme */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compliance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the compliance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheme_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document record */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pension fund scheme */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* Actual document file (e.g., PDF, Word, Excel) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheme_documents_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity performed by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
